user.title: Sub-Zero Group Account
user.description: Log in with your Sub-Zero Owner's App account. A browser window will open for authentication.

auth_callback.title: Complete Authentication
auth_callback.description: After logging in, your browser will redirect to a URL starting with `msauth.com.subzero.group.owners.app://auth?code=...`. Copy the full URL and paste it below.

error.invalid_url: Invalid redirect URL — must contain an authorization code

device_pin.title: Enter Appliance PIN
device_pin.description: Enter the 6-digit PIN shown on the appliance display. Open a door on the appliance and press the 'Show PIN' button first.
